items.title: Ten killed as Russian attacks on merchant ships in Black Sea intensify
items.dek: Russian strikes on the Odesa region have killed 28 people in July alone, local authorities say.
items.body: Russian strikes on the Odesa region have killed 28 people in July alone, local authorities say.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Newcastle, Liverpool and England legend Keegan dies
items.dek: Former England captain and manager Kevin Keegan dies at the age of 75, seven weeks after he revealed he had been diagnosed with stage four cancer.
items.body: Former England captain and manager Kevin Keegan dies at the age of 75, seven weeks after he revealed he had been diagnosed with stage four cancer.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hamas names Khalil al-Hayya as new overall leader
items.dek: The Palestinian armed group's Qatar-based chief negotiator replaces Yahya Sinwar, who was killed by Israeli forces in Gaza in 2024.
items.body: The Palestinian armed group's Qatar-based chief negotiator replaces Yahya Sinwar, who was killed by Israeli forces in Gaza in 2024.
items.author: IriLine Desk
